data.title: Similarweb Names Veteran Investor Harel Beit-On Chairman to Steer AI-Era Growth
data.description:

Similarweb ( (SMWB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Similarweb Ltd. announced that long-serving board member and Viola Group co-founder Harel Beit-On has been appointed Chairman of its Board of Directors, leveraging more than three decades of leadership and technology investment experience. Management emphasized that his deep familiarity with the company and track record in scaling tech firms are expected to support Similarweb’s strategic growth ambitions and strengthen its role as a key data provider in the evolving AI-focused digital analytics market.

Beit-On highlighted Similarweb’s extensive digital data asset as a critical resource for customers worldwide and underscored his intention to help drive long-term shareholder value. The leadership change signals a governance reinforcement as the company seeks to capitalize on AI-related demand for high-quality digital intelligence, potentially enhancing its competitive positioning and reassuring investors about its long-term strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (SMWB) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Similarweb stock, see the SMWB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SMWB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SMWB is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance: strong gross margins and positive free cash flow, but continued net losses and a still-risky balance-sheet profile per the provided statements. Technicals meaningfully weigh on the rating due to a strong downtrend (price far below major moving averages) despite oversold readings. Earnings call guidance and profitability progress provide support, but deal timing uncertainty and sub-100% NRR remain key risks.

To see Spark’s full report on SMWB stock, click here.

More about Similarweb

Similarweb Ltd., listed on the NYSE under the ticker SMWB, operates in the digital market intelligence industry, providing web and app data, analytics, and insights to help businesses discover opportunities, monitor competitors, refine strategy, and optimize customer acquisition. Its products are integrated into customers’ workflows and are positioned as a core digital data layer for decision-making in an increasingly AI-driven business environment.

data.title: BioHarvest’s VINIA Becomes Top U.S. Resveratrol Polyphenol Brand
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

BioHarvest Sciences ( (BHST) ) has issued an announcement.

BioHarvest Sciences has announced that its VINIA brand is now the top-selling resveratrol polyphenol nutraceutical in the U.S., less than five years after entering the market. The product’s position is underpinned by clinically demonstrated benefits in increasing arterial dilation and improving blood flow, as well as a subscription-driven model that has built a strong e-commerce presence.

The company reported more than $30 million in VINIA U.S. revenue for 2025 and about $85 million in cumulative global sales, supported by over 85,000 active users. Management and medical advisors say VINIA’s performance and its plant-cell delivery system validate BioHarvest’s Botanical Synthesis technology, which concentrates piceid resveratrol up to 100 times natural grape levels and is expected to serve as a platform for additional synergistic nutraceutical products.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHST) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BioHarvest Sciences stock, see the BHST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BHST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BHST is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing net losses, negative operating/free cash flow, and elevated leverage) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). The latest earnings call adds support via strong revenue growth, improving gross margins, and guidance pointing toward adjusted EBITDA breakeven, but valuation remains constrained by unprofitability and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on BHST stock, click here.

More about BioHarvest Sciences

BioHarvest Sciences Inc. is a biotechnology company that develops plant-based nutraceuticals using its proprietary Botanical Synthesis platform. Its flagship product, VINIA, is a red grape-derived resveratrol polyphenol supplement focused on cardiovascular and vascular health, sold primarily via a direct-to-consumer e-commerce model in the U.S. and Israel.

Average Trading Volume: 27,688

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $98.77M

data.title: Mustang Maps Major Geophysical Target at Nevada Copper-Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mustang Minerals ( (TSE:MMX) ) just unveiled an update.

Mustang Minerals has confirmed and expanded a large induced polarization geophysical anomaly at its Pilot copper-gold project in central Nevada, identifying a 1.25 by up to 2.2 kilometre chargeability high that remains open. The anomaly coincides with a magnetic high and broad zones of elevated copper, gold, bismuth and molybdenum in soils, supporting the presence of a large hydrothermal alteration system linked to potential porphyry-style mineralisation.

Recent work at Pilot included additional IP lines and soil sampling to better define the limits of the anomaly ahead of a potential first-pass drill program, for which a permit is already in place. Mustang has also extended IP lines at its Red Ring project and completed logistical preparations at Confusion Hills for a possible 2026 drill campaign, underscoring a broader push to systematically advance its Nevada copper-gold exploration portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MMX) stock is a Hold with a C$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mustang Minerals stock, see the TSE:MMX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MMX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MMX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn). Technicals provide some support due to strength versus moving averages and a positive MACD, but overbought readings increase short-term risk. Valuation is difficult to justify on earnings given a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MMX stock, click here.

More about Mustang Minerals

Mustang Minerals Limited is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on copper and gold projects in central Nevada. Its portfolio includes the Pilot porphyry copper-gold prospect and the Red Ring and Confusion Hills high-sulphidation gold-silver-copper targets, all considered prospective for large hydrothermal and porphyry-style mineral systems.

The company is advancing these early-stage assets through geophysical surveys, soil sampling and logistical preparations for drilling, aiming to delineate significant copper-gold mineralisation. Mustang’s Nevada projects position it in a competitive North American copper and gold exploration corridor at a time of strong interest in critical and precious metals.

Average Trading Volume: 49,181

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.54M

data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation Class H ( (HK:2889) ) has provided an update.

PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation reported the poll results of its extraordinary general meeting held in Shanghai on March 26, 2026, where shareholders representing about 58.8% of the company’s issued shares were present in person or by proxy. The meeting, convened and chaired by board chairman Ying Zhenkai, was confirmed to have complied with PRC company law and the firm’s articles, with all directors attending either physically or via electronic means.

Shareholders overwhelmingly approved two special resolutions granting the board a general mandate to repurchase shares and a separate mandate to issue new shares and sell or transfer any treasury shares. Both resolutions received more than two-thirds of the votes cast, enhancing the company’s capital management flexibility and giving management broader tools to adjust its capital structure and respond to market conditions, which may influence future share liquidity and shareholder value.

More about PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation Class H

PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation is a PRC-based joint stock company listed in Hong Kong, operating in the automotive connectivity and smart vehicle technology sector. The company focuses on developing and providing connected car solutions and related services to automakers and drivers, targeting both the domestic Chinese market and international investors through its H share listing.

Fufeng Group Limited ( (HK:0546) ) has issued an update.

Fufeng Group Limited has declared a special cash dividend of HKD 0.015 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, signalling a distribution of excess capital to shareholders. The move underlines the company’s commitment to shareholder returns and suggests a solid financial position ahead of the 29 May 2026 shareholder approval date.

The special dividend will be paid in Hong Kong dollars, with the ex-dividend date set for 2 June 2026 and the record date on 5 June 2026, and payment scheduled for 30 June 2026. The timetable provides clarity for investors on entitlement and cash flow expectations, reinforcing transparency in the company’s capital return policy and dividend management practices.

data.title: Nouveau Monde Graphite Secures Funding and Advances Matawinie Mine Toward Construction
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nouveau Monde Mining ( (TSE:NOU) ) has provided an announcement.

Nouveau Monde Graphite has filed its 2025 financial reports, highlighting substantial progress toward Phase 2 development of its Matawinie graphite mine and downstream battery material operations. The company has secured a fully committed US$335 million senior secured project debt package from Canadian lenders, reinforcing its path toward a final investment decision targeted in the first half of 2026.

The Matawinie project has reached construction readiness, with detailed engineering advanced, preparatory works completed, and key contracts covering over half of projected capex awarded within budget estimates. Commercial agreements with Panasonic Energy, Traxys and the Government of Canada underpin diversified demand for active anode material and graphite concentrate, while a brownfield site acquisition in Bécancour will accelerate construction of the First-Stage Battery Material Plant.

NMG’s strategic positioning has been bolstered by the Canadian government’s referral of Matawinie to the Major Projects Office, underscoring its role in critical minerals development and North American supply chain security. The company also completed a US$20 million equity offering, maintained strong ESG performance, pursued R&D partnerships on advanced graphite composites and next-generation battery materials, and ended the period with approximately C$74 million in cash.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOU) stock is a Buy with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nouveau Monde Mining stock, see the TSE:NOU Stock Forecast page.

Nouveau Monde Mining is facing significant financial challenges with persistent losses and no revenue generation, heavily impacting its score. While technical indicators suggest some positive momentum, the lack of profitability and unattractive valuation metrics weigh down the overall assessment. The absence of earnings call insights and corporate events leaves key strategic and operational questions unanswered.

To see Spark’s full report on NOU stock, click here.

More about Nouveau Monde Mining

Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. is a Canadian mining and advanced materials company focused on developing an integrated graphite platform from the Matawinie mine to battery-grade anode materials. Its primary products target the lithium-ion battery supply chain, with a strategic emphasis on serving Western markets seeking secure, ESG-aligned critical mineral and battery material supply.

data.title: Powermax Targets Structurally Controlled Rare Earths at Atikokan After New Assay Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Powermax Minerals, Inc. ( (TSE:PMAX) ) has provided an update.

Powermax Minerals has released integrated assay and geophysical results from rock, soil, and sediment sampling on its Atikokan REE Property, indicating background to moderately anomalous total rare earth oxide values across multiple media. The findings point to two distinct geological environments, with the Dashwa Gneiss Complex emerging as the primary focus due to higher REE prospectivity and stronger correlations with thorium and uranium.

The company’s interpretation supports a conceptual model of structurally controlled light rare earth mineralization hosted in minerals such as monazite and allanite along shear zones, foliation planes, and lithological contacts. Management says these results provide a clearer roadmap for follow-up exploration, using radiometric and geochemical vectors to refine targets and potentially advance the project from early-stage reconnaissance toward more focused drilling campaigns.

More about Powermax Minerals, Inc.

Powermax Minerals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on rare earth element prospects, with its Atikokan Rare Earth Elements Property located in northwestern Ontario. The company targets structurally controlled REE systems, particularly within gneissic terrains, and uses integrated geochemical and geophysical data to prioritize exploration targets.

Average Trading Volume: 487,587

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Flutter retires 135,025 shares in latest leg of $5bn buyback
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) has shared an update.

Flutter Entertainment has continued executing its previously announced share buyback programme, redeeming and cancelling 135,025 ordinary shares in the United States on 25 March at a volume-weighted average price of $105.36. The purchases, executed through Goldman Sachs across multiple U.S. trading venues, form part of a $250 million buyback over a 10-week period and contribute to the group’s broader plan to repurchase up to $5 billion of shares.

Following settlement and cancellation of these latest redemptions, Flutter’s share count will fall to 174,783,856 ordinary shares in issue, modestly enhancing earnings and ownership for remaining shareholders. The ongoing buyback underlines management’s capital-return strategy and confidence in the company’s valuation, while also aligning with regulatory disclosure requirements in the U.K. and the markets where the shares were repurchased.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment plc is a global sports betting and online gaming group. The company operates a portfolio of betting and gaming brands, offering sportsbook, casino and related interactive entertainment products to customers in key regulated markets, including the United States, the United Kingdom and Ireland.

For an in-depth examination of FLUT stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Acumen Updates Alzheimer’s Pipeline, Extends Cash Runway Into 2027
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Acumen Pharmaceuticals ( (ABOS) ) has shared an update.

On March 26, 2026, Acumen Pharmaceuticals reported full-year 2025 results and updated investors on progress in its Alzheimer’s pipeline, highlighting ongoing Phase 2 development of sabirnetug and expansion of its Enhanced Brain Delivery platform. The company also refreshed its corporate presentation to reflect year-end 2025 cash of $116.9 million and a $35.75 million private placement completed on March 16, 2026, extending its cash runway into early 2027.

During 2025 the company increased R&D spend to $104.9 million, driving a larger net loss of $121.3 million, as it funded the ALTITUDE-AD trial, EBD research and manufacturing scale-up. Operationally, Acumen dosed the first patient in the open-label extension of ALTITUDE-AD in November 2025 and presented new data at key neurology conferences, while guiding that Phase 2 topline results are expected in late 2026 and an IND for its EBD lead candidate is targeted for mid-2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (ABOS) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Acumen Pharmaceuticals stock, see the ABOS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABOS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABOS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and worsening cash burn that elevates dilution risk). This is partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook (clear clinical milestones and cash runway into early 2027) and supportive technical trend, though momentum appears overbought. Valuation signals are limited due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ABOS stock, click here.

More about Acumen Pharmaceuticals

Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics targeting toxic soluble amyloid beta oligomers for the treatment of Alzheimer’s disease. Its lead candidate, sabirnetug (ACU193), a humanized monoclonal antibody granted Fast Track designation in the U.S., is being evaluated in the Phase 2 ALTITUDE-AD trial, alongside work on subcutaneous delivery and an Enhanced Brain Delivery program with JCR Pharmaceuticals.

Average Trading Volume: 828,934

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $159.3M
